title: EBTA point-in-time data declaration (G1 form)
description: Formulaire G1 : declaration des donnees point-in-time avant splits et features. Source: SOP 09A; DN-025; PAQUET D'EXECUTION section 1.
x_normative_source: Protocole/PAQUET D'EXECUTION EBTA.md section 1 (G1 form); SOP 09A; DN-025, DN-026, DN-027

config_id.description: Reference to the preregistered configuration (config_id from config.schema.json).

declared_at.description: ISO-8601 timestamp; must be before any splits or feature engineering.

data_sources.description: List of data sources with snapshot identification and availability metadata.

asset_universe.description: Pre-registered point-in-time asset universe when assets are selectable candidates.

asset_universe_hash.description: Hash proving the point-in-time asset universe snapshot.

asset_selection_rule.description: Pre-registered rule governing which declared assets are evaluated.

macro_fundamental_alternative_versioned.description: True if macro/fundamental/alternative data is versioned by vintage (required when applicable).

anti_leakage_controls_executed.description: True confirms anti-leakage controls have been run and archived (DN-025).

anti_leakage_archive_path.description: Path or reference to the archived anti-leakage control results.

purge_and_embargo_defined.description: True confirms purge and embargo are defined and consistent with data dependencies (DN-027).

transformations_learned_on_train_only.description: True confirms all learned transformations are fitted exclusively on Train_k (DN-026).

transformation_fit_log_hash.description: Hash of the transformation fit log proving Train_k-only fitting.
